problem id: 0245b9bb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  10011111 -> 01100011
  11011010 -> 00111111
  11010100 -> 11111110
  01001111 -> 00111011
  01101010 -> 11111111
  01000101 -> 10111010
  01100011 -> 01001110
  00101100 -> 10001111

query: 10001101
predicted answer: 00001001
